title: Authorize Produces "ERR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS"
excerpt: After adding Monday.com app in Slack, create an item prompts Authorize but the authorize opens a browser and produces an error, “Page isn’t redirecting properly” in Firefox or “ERR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS” in Chrome

posts.author: moonbug (John Shaw)
posts.cookedHtml: After adding Monday.com app in Slack, create an item prompts Authorize but the authorize opens a browser and produces an error, “Page isn’t redirecting properly” in Firefox or “ERR_TOO_MANY_REDIRECTS” in Chrome
